<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh-CN">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>蒋梓韵 · 个人简历</title>

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+SC:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Noto+Sans+SC:wght@300;400;500&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

  :root {

    --cream: #FAF7F2;

    --ink: #1C1A18;

    --ink-soft: #3D3A36;

    --mist: #8C8580;

    --accent: #C9563A;

    --accent-pale: #F5EDE4;

    --gold: #B8933F;

    --border: #E5DDD4;

    --card: #FFFFFF;

    --tag-bg: #F0EBE4;

    --ease: cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);

  }

  *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}

  html{scroll-behavior:smooth}

  body{background:var(--cream);color:var(--ink);font-family:"Noto Sans SC",sans-serif;font-weight:300;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}

 

  /* NAV */

  nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;padding:1.1rem 2.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(250,247,242,0.9);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}

  .nav-logo{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none}

  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none}

  .nav-links a{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--mist);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.06em;transition:color .2s}

  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent)}

 

  /* HERO */

  #hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;overflow:hidden}

  .hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:8rem 3rem 5rem 5rem;z-index:2}

  .hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem}

  .hero-tag::before{content:"";display:block;width:2rem;height:1px;background:var(--accent)}

  .hero-name-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1.2rem;flex-wrap:wrap}

  .hero-contact{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.25rem;padding-bottom:.4rem}

  .hero-contact span{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mist);letter-spacing:.03em}

  .hero-name{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,8vw,6.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:.25rem}

  .hero-name-en{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,2.5vw,1.8rem);color:var(--mist);margin-bottom:2rem;font-weight:400}

  .hero-desc{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:460px;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:2.5rem}

  .hero-desc strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:500}

  .hero-cta{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}

  .btn-primary{padding:.8rem 1.8rem;background:var(--ink);color:var(--cream);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em;border:none;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:background .2s,transform .2s var(--ease)}

  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px)}

  .btn-outline{padding:.8rem 1.8rem;background:transparent;color:var(--ink);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.08em;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,transform .2s var(--ease)}

  .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px)}

 

  .hero-right{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--cream)}

  .hero-photo-wrap{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-52%);z-index:2}

  .hero-photo-frame{width:260px;height:320px;position:relative}

  .hero-photo-frame::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-12px;right:-12px;width:100%;height:100%;border:2px solid var(--accent);z-index:-1;transition:transform .4s var(--ease)}

  .hero-photo-frame:hover::before{transform:translate(6px,6px)}

  .hero-photo-frame::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-8px;left:-8px;width:60%;height:60%;border:1px solid var(--gold);z-index:-1;opacity:.5}

  .hero-photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;filter:grayscale(8%);transition:filter .4s}

  .hero-photo-frame:hover img{filter:grayscale(0%)}

  .hero-stats{position:absolute;bottom:3.5rem;left:3rem;display:flex;gap:2.5rem}

  .stat-num{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:2.5rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.2rem}

  .stat-label{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mist);letter-spacing:.06em}

 

  /* SECTIONS */

  section{padding:5.5rem 0}

  .container{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 3rem}

  .section-header{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:3.5rem}

  .section-num{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.1em}

  .section-title{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.5vw,1.9rem);font-weight:600}

  .section-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border);margin-left:1rem}

 

  /* ABOUT */

  #about{background:var(--card)}

  .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}

  .about-text{font-size:.98rem;line-height:2;color:var(--ink-soft)}

  .about-text strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:500}

  .about-highlights{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.2rem}

  .highlight-card{padding:1.4rem 1.5rem;background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);transition:transform .2s var(--ease)}

  .highlight-card:hover{transform:translateX(4px)}

  .hc-title{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.35rem}

  .hc-text{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--mist);line-height:1.75}

 

  /* EDUCATION */

  #education{background:var(--cream)}

  .edu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem}

  .edu-card{padding:2.5rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .3s var(--ease)}

  .edu-card:hover{box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(28,26,24,.08)}

  .edu-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--gold))}

  .edu-logo{height:48px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:block}

  .edu-school{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.25rem}

  .edu-degree{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:1.4rem;font-weight:500}

  .edu-label{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mist);margin-bottom:.6rem;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase}

  .edu-courses{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.45rem}

  .tag{padding:.28rem .75rem;background:var(--tag-bg);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--ink-soft);letter-spacing:.04em;border:1px solid var(--border)}

  /* QS Ranking badge */

  .qs-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.75rem;margin-bottom:.2rem}

  .qs-icon{display:none}

  .qs-text{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mist);letter-spacing:.04em}

  .qs-rank{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:500}

  .qs-year{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mist)}

  /* TOPIK badge */

  .topik-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0;margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:.2rem;border:2px solid #1a4b8c;overflow:hidden}

  .topik-label{background:#1a4b8c;color:#fff;font-size:.58rem;padding:.3rem .55rem;letter-spacing:.04em;writing-mode:horizontal-tb;font-weight:500}

  .topik-level{background:#fff;color:#1a4b8c;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;padding:.3rem .5rem;letter-spacing:.08em}

  .topik-num{background:#c9222d;color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;padding:.3rem .6rem;font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;letter-spacing:.02em}

  .topik-sub{background:#f5f5f5;color:#666;font-size:.6rem;padding:.3rem .5rem;letter-spacing:.04em;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}

  /* GPA badge */

  .gpa-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin:.9rem 0 1.1rem}

  .gpa-badge{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:.15rem;background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.4rem .9rem}

  .gpa-val{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}

  .gpa-slash{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--mist);padding:0 .1rem}

  .gpa-total{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--mist)}

  .gpa-note{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--gold);background:rgba(184,147,63,.1);padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid rgba(184,147,63,.25);line-height:1.4}

  .edu-exchange{margin-top:1.2rem;padding-top:1.2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

  .edu-exchange-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:.6rem}

  .edu-exchange-logo{height:28px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;opacity:.85}

 

  /* DOMAINS */

  #domains{background:var(--card)}

  .domains-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.5rem}

  .domain-card{padding:2.2rem;background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all .3s var(--ease);cursor:default}

  .domain-card:hover{background:var(--ink);border-color:var(--ink)}

  .domain-card:hover .domain-title,.domain-card:hover .domain-text{color:var(--cream)}

  .domain-card:hover .tag{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:rgba(250,247,242,.75)}

  .domain-img{width:100%;height:110px;object-fit:cover;margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:block;filter:grayscale(20%);transition:filter .3s}

  .domain-card:hover .domain-img{filter:grayscale(0%) brightness(.85)}

  .domain-title{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.6rem;transition:color .3s}

  .domain-text{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--mist);line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:1rem;transition:color .3s}

  .domain-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem}

 

  /* PROJECTS */

  #projects{background:var(--cream)}

  .projects-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}

  .project-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:72px 1fr auto;gap:2rem;align-items:start;padding:2.5rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:none;transition:background .2s}

  .project-item:last-child{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}

  .project-item:hover{background:var(--accent-pale)}

  .project-num{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:2.2rem;color:var(--border);line-height:1;font-style:italic;padding-top:.2rem}

  .project-title{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.3rem}

  .project-sub{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:.9rem}

  .project-desc{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.85}

  .project-img-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;min-width:140px}

  .project-img{width:140px;height:90px;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:grayscale(10%)}

  .project-metrics{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.75rem;min-width:140px;text-align:right;padding-top:.2rem}

  .metric-val{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}

  .metric-label{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--mist);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}

 

  /* EXPERIENCE */

  #experience{background:var(--card)}

  .exp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}

  .exp-card{padding:2rem;background:var(--cream);border:1px solid var(--border);border-top:3px solid var(--accent);position:relative;transition:box-shadow .3s var(--ease)}

  .exp-card:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(28,26,24,.07)}

  .exp-logo{height:36px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:block}

  .exp-company{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.2rem}

  .exp-role{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:1rem}

  .exp-points{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem}

  .exp-points li{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--ink-soft);display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:.5rem;line-height:1.7}

  .exp-points li::before{content:"―";color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0;font-size:.65rem}

 

  /* SKILLS */

  #skills{background:var(--ink)}

  #skills .section-title{color:var(--cream)}

  #skills .section-num{color:var(--accent)}

  #skills .section-line{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}

  .skills-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:4rem}

  .skills-col-title{font-family:"Noto Serif SC",serif;font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,.4);letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.2rem}

  .lang-item{display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;padding:.7rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)}

  .lang-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}

  .lang-name{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--cream)}

  .lang-cert{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.08em;background:rgba(184,147,63,.15);padding:.18rem .55rem}

  .skill-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.3rem;margin-bottom:.9rem}

  .skill-name{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--cream)}

  .skill-bar-bg{height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:1px;overflow:hidden}

  .skill-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--gold));border-radius:1px;transform-origin:left;animation:barGrow 1.2s var(--ease) forwards;transform:scaleX(0)}

  @keyframes barGrow{to{transform:scaleX(1)}}

  .ai-tools{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.45rem}

  .ai-tool-tag{padding:.35rem .85rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);font-size:.68rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,.75);letter-spacing:.05em;transition:all .2s;cursor:default}

  .ai-tool-tag:hover{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--cream)}

  .workflow-row{display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-top:1.4rem}

  .wf-step{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,.6);padding:.3rem .7rem;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}

  .wf-arrow{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--accent)}

 

  /* FOOTER */

  footer{background:var(--cream);padding:2.5rem;text-align:center;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--mist);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:.06em}

 

  /* ANIMATIONS */

  .fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .7s var(--ease),transform .7s var(--ease)}

  .fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:none}

 

  /* TWEAKS */

  #tweaks-toggle{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;z-index:200;width:42px;height:42px;background:var(--ink);color:var(--cream);border:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;transition:background .2s}

  #tweaks-toggle:hover{background:var(--accent)}

  #tweaks-panel{position:fixed;bottom:5rem;right:2rem;z-index:200;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:1.4rem;width:210px;box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(28,26,24,.12);display:none}

  #tweaks-panel.open{display:block}

  .tweaks-title{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.9rem;padding-bottom:.7rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}

  .tweak-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:.7rem}

  .tweak-label{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--ink-soft)}

  .tweak-btn-group{display:flex;gap:.3rem}

  .tweak-btn{padding:.28rem .6rem;font-size:.68rem;background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--ink-soft);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;letter-spacing:.04em}

  .tweak-btn.active,.tweak-btn:hover{background:var(--ink);color:var(--cream);border-color:var(--ink)}

 

  @media(max-width:900px){

    #hero{grid-template-columns:1fr}

    .hero-right{display:none}

    .hero-left{padding:8rem 1.5rem 4rem}

    .about-grid,.edu-grid,.domains-grid,.skills-cols,.exp-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}

    .project-item{grid-template-columns:50px 1fr}

    .project-metrics{display:none}

    .container{padding:0 1.5rem}

    section{padding:4rem 0}

  }

 

  /* XHS post mockup */

  .xhs-mockup-wrap{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:2rem;margin-top:1.2rem}

  .xhs-phone{

    flex-shrink:0;

    width:140px;

    background:#fff;

    border-radius:16px;

    box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(28,26,24,.15);

    overflow:hidden;

    border:6px solid #1a1a1a;

    position:relative;

  }

  .xhs-phone::before{

    content:'';

    display:block;

    width:40px;height:4px;

    background:#1a1a1a;

    border-radius:2px;

    margin:6px auto 0;

  }

  .xhs-phone img{

    width:100%;

    display:block;

    margin-top:4px;

  }

  .xhs-stat-col{

    display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;padding-top:.2rem;

  }

  .xhs-stat{

    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;

    padding:.5rem .8rem;

    background:var(--cream);

    border:1px solid var(--border);

    border-left:3px solid #fe2c55;

  }

  .xhs-stat-icon{font-size:1rem}

  .xhs-stat-info{}

  .xhs-stat-val{font-family:"DM Serif Display",serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--ink);line-height:1}

  .xhs-stat-lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--mist);letter-spacing:.05em}

 

</style>

</head>

<body>

 

<nav>

  <a class="nav-logo" href="#hero">蒋梓韵</a>

  <ul class="nav-links">

    <li><a href="#about">简介</a></li>

    <li><a href="#education">教育</a></li>

    <li><a href="#domains">领域</a></li>

    <li><a href="#projects">项目</a></li>

    <li><a href="#experience">实习</a></li>

    <li><a href="#skills">技能</a></li>

  </ul>

</nav>

 

<!-- HERO -->

<section id="hero">

  <div class="hero-left">

    <div class="hero-tag">文化内容 · AI驱动 · 跨文化传播</div>

    <div class="hero-name-row">

      <h1 class="hero-name">蒋梓韵</h1>

      <div class="hero-contact">

        <span>23岁</span>

        <span>1365113662@qq.com</span>

        <span>微信：jzyjolin</span>

        <span>17823740675</span>

      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="hero-name-en">Jiang Ziyun</div>

    <p class="hero-desc">文化内容研究者与<strong>AI驱动内容生产实践者</strong>，长期关注韩国文化产业、IP运营及消费者行为研究。具备中韩跨文化传播背景，单篇内容实现 <strong>30万+阅读</strong>。</p>

    <div class="hero-cta">

      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">查看项目经历</a>

      <a href="#about" class="btn-outline">了解更多</a>

    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">

    <div class="hero-photo-wrap">

      </div>

</section>

 

<!-- ABOUT -->

<section id="about">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="section-header fade-up">

      <span class="section-num">01</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">个人简介</h2>

      <div class="section-line"></div>

    </div>

    <div class="about-grid">

      <div class="about-text fade-up">

        <p>文化内容研究者与<strong>AI驱动内容生产实践者</strong>，长期关注韩国文化产业、IP运营及消费者行为研究。具备中韩跨文化传播背景，系统学习文化产业论、内容营销、消费者行为、文化政策等课程，完成韩国IP、游戏产业及K-POP产业相关研究项目。</p>

        <br>

        <p>拥有社媒运营及内容策划经验，<strong>独立运营韩国生活方式账号</strong>，实现单篇内容30万+阅读。熟练运用ChatGPT、Claude等AI工具搭建内容生产工作流，能够快速完成市场调研、内容策划及视觉化表达。</p>

      </div>

      <div class="about-highlights fade-up">

        <div class="highlight-card">

          <div class="hc-title">�� 跨文化背景</div>

          <div class="hc-text">北京语言大学 → 台湾中国文化大学（交换）→ 高丽大学（硕士），三地多元学习经历</div>

        </div>

        <div class="highlight-card">

          <div class="hc-title">�� 内容创作成就</div>

          <div class="hc-text">小红书/抖音独立运营，单篇30万+阅读，爆款内容单篇涨粉200+，累计原创36篇</div>

        </div>

        <div class="highlight-card">

          <div class="hc-title">�� AI工具链实践</div>

          <div class="hc-text">搭建AI工作流，15分钟内完成HTML个人网站，具备独立设计个人展示页面的能力</div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

<!-- DOMAINS -->

<section id="domains">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="section-header fade-up">

      <span class="section-num">03</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">核心领域</h2>

      <div class="section-line"></div>

    </div>

    <div class="domains-grid">

      <div class="domain-card fade-up">

        <img class="domain-img" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548943487-a2e4e43b4853?w=600&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt="韩国文化">

        <div class="domain-title">韩国市场与文化内容研究</div>

        <div class="domain-text">系统研究韩国文化产业、IP运营模式与消费者行为，熟悉Instagram、X、Naver、Kakao等平台生态，长期关注韩国年轻群体内容消费习惯与文化趋势。</div>

        <div class="domain-tags">

          <span class="tag">文化产业</span><span class="tag">K-POP</span><span class="tag">游戏产业</span><span class="tag">平台生态</span>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="domain-card fade-up">

        <img class="domain-img" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=600&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt="IP文化周边">

        <div class="domain-title">IP文化产品与用户洞察</div>

        <div class="domain-text">研究Disney、三丽鸥、Kakao Friends等代表性IP案例，分析IP授权、联名营销、商品化运营及用户消费机制，聚焦身份认同与情感连接研究。</div>

        <div class="domain-tags">

          <span class="tag">IP授权</span><span class="tag">联名营销</span><span class="tag">消费者行为</span><span class="tag">情感价值</span>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="domain-card fade-up">

        <img class="domain-img" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1677442136019-21780ecad995?w=600&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt="AI内容生产">

        <div class="domain-title">AI驱动内容生产</div>

        <div class="domain-text">熟练使用多款AI工具，搭建GPT→Claude→AnyGen→Canva内容生产工作流，15分钟内完成HTML个人网站，会设计个人网页，拥有自身AI工作流，持续优化内容生产效率。</div>

        <div class="domain-tags">

          <span class="tag">工作流搭建</span><span class="tag">Prompt优化</span><span class="tag">内容可视化</span>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="domain-card fade-up">

        <img class="domain-img" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611162617213-7d7a39e9b1d7?w=600&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt="社媒运营">

        <div class="domain-title">社媒运营与内容策划</div>

        <div class="domain-text">独立完成选题策划、内容生产、数据分析及用户互动，具备热点分析、竞品拆解及增长复盘能力，熟悉阅读量、互动率等核心指标分析。</div>

        <div class="domain-tags">

          <span class="tag">小红书</span><span class="tag">抖音</span><span class="tag">数据分析</span><span class="tag">增长策略</span>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- PROJECTS -->

<section id="projects">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="section-header fade-up">

      <span class="section-num">04</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">项目经历</h2>

      <div class="section-line"></div>

    </div>

    <div class="projects-list">

 

      <div class="project-item fade-up">

        <div class="project-num">01</div>

        <div class="project-body">

          <div class="project-title">韩国生活方式与文化观察账号运营</div>

          <div class="project-sub">小红书 / 抖音 · 独立运营</div>

          <div class="project-desc">

            账号定位：韩国生活｜文化观察｜留学体验｜美食消费。90%内容聚焦韩国生活方式，结合热点趋势、用户兴趣及平台机制进行选题策划，通过竞品分析与数据复盘持续优化内容表现。<br><br>

            <strong>爆款：</strong>《丹凤眼与漫画丹凤眼特征对比》获得30万+阅读，实现高互动传播效果。

          <div class="xhs-mockup-wrap">

            <div class="xhs-phone">

                </div>

              </div>

            </div>

          </div>

          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="project-metrics">

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">30万+</div>

            <div class="metric-label">单篇最高阅读</div>

          </div>

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">36篇</div>

            <div class="metric-label">累计原创</div>

          </div>

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">200+</div>

            <div class="metric-label">爆款单篇涨粉</div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

 

      <div class="project-item fade-up">

        <div class="project-num">02</div>

        <div class="project-body">

          <div class="project-title">韩国IP与文化消费研究项目</div>

          <div class="project-sub">学术研究 · 高丽大学</div>

          <div class="project-desc">

            研究对象：Disney｜三丽鸥｜Kakao Friends。系统分析IP授权与商业化运营模式、联名营销与品牌协同路径，聚焦韩国年轻消费者IP消费行为及情感价值与身份认同机制。<br><br>

            <strong>结论：</strong>IP消费是身份表达与情感连接的经验消费；世界观构建决定持续关注意愿；本地化叙事是长期运营的关键。

          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="project-metrics">

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">3</div>

            <div class="metric-label">标杆IP研究</div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

 

      <div class="project-item fade-up">

        <div class="project-num">03</div>

        <div class="project-body">

          <div class="project-title">AI内容生产实践项目</div>

          <div class="project-sub">个人实践 · 工作流搭建</div>

          <div class="project-desc">

            内容类型：个人网站｜学术汇报｜产品介绍。搭建ChatGPT → Claude → AnyGen → Canva全流程，实现需求输入到HTML个人网站15分钟内完成，会设计个人展示页面，拥有自身AI内容生产工作流。

          </div>

        </div>

        <div class="project-metrics">

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">15min</div>

            <div class="metric-label">HTML网站成稿</div>

          </div>

          <div class="metric-item">

            <div class="metric-val">4+</div>

            <div class="metric-label">AI工具协作</div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

 

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->

<section id="experience">

  <div class="container">

      </div>

        <div class="exp-role">内容运营实习生</div>

        <ul class="exp-points">

          <li>参与短视频及视觉海报内容制作，输出宣传海报20+份</li>

      </div>

 

      <div class="exp-card fade-up">

        </ul>

      </div>

 

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- SKILLS -->

<section id="skills">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="section-header fade-up">

      <span class="section-num">06</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">技能</h2>

      <div class="section-line"></div>

    </div>

    <div class="skills-cols">

      <div class="fade-up">

        <div class="skills-col-title">语言能力</div>

        <div class="lang-item"><span class="lang-name">普通话</span><span class="lang-cert">母语</span></div>

        <div class="lang-item"><span class="lang-name">韩语</span><span class="lang-cert">TOPIK 5级</span></div>

        <div class="lang-item"><span class="lang-name">英语</span><span class="lang-cert">雅思 6.5 · 专四</span></div>

        <br>

        <div class="skills-col-title" style="margin-top:.8rem">研究方向</div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">韩国文化产业</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:92%;animation-delay:.1s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">IP运营研究</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:88%;animation-delay:.2s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">消费者行为</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:85%;animation-delay:.3s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">跨文化传播</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:90%;animation-delay:.4s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skills-col-title">内容运营</div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">社媒内容策划</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:93%;animation-delay:.1s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">热点分析与选题</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:88%;animation-delay:.2s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">数据分析复盘</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:82%;animation-delay:.3s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">竞品分析</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:86%;animation-delay:.4s"></div></div></div>

        <div class="skill-row"><div class="skill-name">视觉内容创作</div><div class="skill-bar-bg"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:80%;animation-delay:.5s"></div></div></div>

      </div>

      <div class="fade-up">

        <div class="skills-col-title">AI工具链</div>

        <div class="ai-tools">

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">ChatGPT</span>

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">Claude</span>

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">DeepSeek</span>

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">Kimi</span>

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">豆包</span>

          <span class="ai-tool-tag">Napkin</span>

  </div>

</section>

 

<footer>

  <p style="font-family:'Noto Serif SC',serif;font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:.4rem">蒋梓韵 · Jiang Ziyun</p>

  <p>文化内容研究者 · AI内容生产实践者 · 高丽大学文化内容学硕士在读</p>

</footer>

 

<button id="tweaks-toggle" title="Tweaks">⚙</button>

<div id="tweaks-panel">

  <div class="tweaks-title">Tweaks</div>

  <div class="tweak-row">

    <span class="tweak-label">强调色</span>

    <div class="tweak-btn-group">

      <button class="tweak-btn active" onclick="setAccent('#C9563A',this)">砖红</button>

      <button class="tweak-btn" onclick="setAccent('#2E6BE6',this)">蓝调</button>

      <button class="tweak-btn" onclick="setAccent('#4A7C59',this)">墨绿</button>

    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="tweak-row">

    <span class="tweak-label">字体大小</span>

    <div class="tweak-btn-group">

      <button class="tweak-btn" onclick="setSize('14px',this)">小</button>

      <button class="tweak-btn active" onclick="setSize('16px',this)">中</button>

      <button class="tweak-btn" onclick="setSize('18px',this)">大</button>

    </div>

  </div>

</div>

 

<script>

  document.getElementById("tweaks-toggle").addEventListener("click",()=>{

    document.getElementById("tweaks-panel").classList.toggle("open")

  });

  function setAccent(c,btn){

    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--accent",c);

    btn.closest(".tweak-btn-group").querySelectorAll(".tweak-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));

    btn.classList.add("active");

  }

  function setSize(s,btn){

    document.documentElement.style.fontSize=s;

    btn.closest(".tweak-btn-group").querySelectorAll(".tweak-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));

    btn.classList.add("active");

  }

  const obs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{

    entries.forEach((e,i)=>{

      if(e.isIntersecting){

        e.target.style.transitionDelay=`${(i%4)*0.08}s`;

        e.target.classList.add("visible");

      }

    });

  },{threshold:0.1});

  document.querySelectorAll(".fade-up").forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

 

  const skillObs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{

    entries.forEach(e=>{

      if(e.isIntersecting){

        e.target.querySelectorAll(".skill-bar-fill").forEach(b=>{

          b.style.animation="none";b.offsetHeight;b.style.animation="";

        });

      }

    });

  },{threshold:0.3});

  const sk=document.getElementById("skills");

  if(sk)skillObs.observe(sk);

</script>

</body>

</html>
